mainEntity.name: How does Perplexity handle multi-location law firms like in NY and LA?
mainEntity.text: How does Perplexity handle multi-location law firms like in NY and LA?

acceptedAnswer.text: Perplexity cites location-specific pages for multi-location firms, prioritizing geo-targeted content over homepages for NY/LA queries.

suggestedAnswer.text: Create /new-york/ and /los-angeles/ subpages with unique FAQs. Use hreflang if international. Track citations per city; consolidate if thin.

name: Perplexity for Multi-Location Firms
description: Perplexity cites location-specific pages for multi-location firms, prioritizing geo-targeted content over homepages for NY/LA queries.
